title: Life in Canada as a graduate student - Canada.ca
content:
## Life in Canada as a graduate student
Prepare yourself for life in Canada as a student by learning about Canada’s education system, study costs, housing options, employment opportunities and more.
Find out about tuition fees and how much it costs to apply to the program of your choice
Learn how much it cost to live in Canada and how much money you need to cover your expenses

### Find housing and accommodation
Learn about living on and off campus and finding accommodation
Set up a bank account in Canada, get a credit card and make international money transfers
Get information about renting an apartment or a house in Canada
Find out how to get health coverage in the province where you want to study
Access mental health support and resources for international students

## Working as a student

### Work while you study
Discover if you can work while studying and how much and where (on campus, off campus and co-op)

### Work after you graduate
Find out what type of work permit you need to work in Canada as a post-doctoral fellow or researcher
Find work and plan your career with Canada’s national employment service

### Virtual sessions: Pathways to permanent residence
Register for a session to learn about pathways to stay in Canada after you graduate

## Your studying journey

### Stories from other international students
Stories from other students about their experiences in Canada

### Get an international student ID card
Access exclusive discounts and benefits for international students

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
